plugins.name: editorial-os
plugins.description: Editorial strategy system. 7 commands, 5 specialist skills — audit, competitor analysis, 90-day calendars, drafting, social repurposing. Your Google Drive folder is the configuration.

plugins.name: email-marketing-manager
plugins.description: Newsletter production with a persistent learning loop. Drafts to your voice, generates segment variants, predicts performance, writes learnings back to Drive after every send.

plugins.name: pinterest-marketing-strategist
plugins.description: Pinterest pin production. Composed batches from your approved image library — SEO copy, board assignment, staggered scheduling, performance learning.

plugins.name: composer
plugins.description: Package stories with matched visual assets, usage rights, platform-ready crops, and archival context. One brief in, one publishable package out.

plugins.name: photo-editor
plugins.description: Post-shoot metadata pipeline. Embeds XMP/IPTC into images via ExifTool — traceable to products, rights, dates, and shoot context.
